title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 10
instructions: For each question, choose the correct picture. You will hear each audio twice.

items.context: You hear customer and assistant talking about the class photo.
items.audio_script: Customer: Hi, Mia. I’m checking the plan for the class photo. I thought we were going to stand by the playground, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Assistant: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]We’re taking it in the garden behind the school[/1]. || Customer: Good thing I asked. I nearly gone to the playground gate. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Assistant: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: customer
dialogue.text: Hi, Mia. I’m checking the plan for the class photo. I thought we were going to stand by the playground, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message.

dialogue.speaker: assistant
dialogue.text: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. We’re taking it in the garden behind the school.

dialogue.speaker: customer
dialogue.text: Good thing I asked. I nearly gone to the playground gate. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast.

dialogue.speaker: assistant
dialogue.text: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

items.question: Where will the photo be taken?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, school playground, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, school garden with trees, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, classroom wall, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

items.explanation: The speaker says: “We’re taking it in the garden behind the school.” This matches option B.

items.context: You hear woman and man talking about the film.

I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Man: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.
